scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields, protocol options with correct location formats, and auto-labels for each type. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The '-' prefix for service exclusion (e.g. '[-noisy-svc]') is not mentioned in the gold standard and may be an invented detail. The charm integration section with ops.pebble.Layer is plausible but not in the gold standard.
